creator: hsu@clinet.fi
text:
telnet -8 does not seem to work from FreeBSD any more, try

		telnet shadows.cs.hut.fi -8

	while

		telnet shadows.cs.hut.fi

	works.

Fix: 

I don't know whether this is a bug in FreeBSD or Solaris/SunOS.
How-To-Repeat: 
	telnet a SunOS or Solaris machine with -8 option.  I don't know
	for sure if it is SunOS, but with Solaris FreeBSD exhibits this
	behavior.
